name: Police Sub-Inspector (SI)
description: Milestones for clearing police SI recruitments, physical screening tests, and basic training academies.

detail.overview: Obtain any Bachelor's degree (BA/BSc/BCom/BTech) from an officially recognized university.

free_resources.label: State Police SI Exam Complete Syllabus Info

checklist: Graduation cleared with no active arrears
Aged between 21 and 28 years (varies per state)

sub_topics.label: Graduation cleared with no active arrears
Aged between 21 and 28 years (varies per state)

detail.overview: Study and clear multiple papers covering General Knowledge, Numerical Ability, Reasoning, and Regional Language.

free_resources.label: General Knowledge Previous Years Sample Qs

checklist: Strong awareness of local state laws and geography

sub_topics.label: Strong awareness of local state laws and geography

detail.overview: Pass the mandatory chest/height benchmarks, and clear sprint races, high-jumps, and long-jumps.
checklist: Completed 1600m run test within statutory limits

sub_topics.label: Completed 1600m run test within statutory limits

detail.overview: Secure placement in regional police training colleges to study penal code, defense, weaponry, and protocols.

official.label: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy

free_resources.label: Indian Penal Code (IPC) Basic Summary Booklet
